eDrops/src/main/java/com/sigmondsmart/ed.general_idea: Introduce SLF4J logger to enable structured logging in the controller.
eDrops/src/main/java/com/sigmondsmart/ed.human_impl: import org.slf4j.Logger; import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory; private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(EDropsController.class);

eDrops/src/main/java/com/sigmondsmart/ed.general_idea: Replace generic @RequestMapping with specific @GetMapping for better REST semantics.
Change the root path mapping from '/' to '/java' to reflect the Java 17 migration context.
Add an info-level log message when the welcome endpoint is accessed.
Pass an additional message attribute to the view to indicate the Java version context.
Add a new attribute 'messageJ' to the model in the welcome endpoint.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Updated Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.5 to 2.7.6 for minor bug fixes and compatibility.
Changed the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Updated JUnit Jupiter version from 5.9.1 to 5.9.2 for test framework stability.
Updated H2 database driver version from 2.1.212 to 2.1.214 for minor improvements.
Corrected the Kotlin source directory path to use the project base directory variable for robustness.
Added the 'release' configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin to ensure cross-compilation compatibility with Java 17.
Explicitly defined the resources directory in the build configuration to ensure IDE and build tool consistency.
Added the Thymeleaf Layout Dialect dependency to support template inheritance and layout features.
Replaced the deprecated spring-boot-test dependency with the standard spring-boot-starter-test for modern testing support.

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Renamed the logging instance from 'log' to 'logger' to align with standard naming conventions or a previous refactoring.
Rename the logging instance from 'log' to 'logger' to align with common naming conventions or framework defaults.
Renamed the logger instance from 'log' to 'logger' to align with common naming conventions or a specific migration standard.
Added a 'tag' field to the BlogEntry entity to support categorization or filtering.
Added a 'version' field to the BlogEntry entity, likely for optimistic locking or versioning.
Added a 'title' field to the BlogEntry entity to store the blog post title.
Added a 'summary' field with a length constraint to the BlogEntry entity.
Added a 'blog' relationship field to link BlogEntry to a Blog entity.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.human_impl: @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY, optional = false) @JoinColumn(name = "blogEntries", nullable = false) var blog: Blog

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Changed 'changed' property from immutable (val) to mutable (var) to allow updates.
Removed the 'text' field from the BlogEntry entity, likely replaced by title/summary or moved.
Added a custom toString() method to the BlogEntry class for better debugging/logging output.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.human_impl: override fun toString() = "id: $id blog: $blog created: $created changed: $changed text: $title"

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Inject DbService into the controller to enable database operations.
Add a new endpoint to trigger blog creation via the injected service.
Add a new endpoint to trigger blog reading via the injected service.

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Configured server error handling to include stacktrace and exception details.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.human_impl:
server:
  error:
    include-stacktrace: always
    include-exception: true

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Disabled the Spring Boot startup banner.
Configured internationalization message sources with fallback and encoding.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.human_impl:
spring:
  messages:
    basename: language/messages
    fallback-to-system-locale: true
    encoding: UTF-8

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Explicitly set the Hibernate database platform dialect for H2.
Enabled deferred datasource initialization to allow schema/data scripts to run before application context is fully initialized.
Added Hibernate property to control SQL logging visibility.
Changed the in-memory H2 database name from mydb1 to mydb2.
Explicitly specified the JDBC driver class name for H2.
Enabled the H2 web console for database inspection.
Configured Thymeleaf template engine settings including cache disabling and encoding.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.human_impl:
spring:
  thymeleaf:
    cache: false
    enabled: true
    encoding: UTF-8
    mode: HTML5

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Configured static resource locations and disabled caching for development.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.human_impl:
spring:
  web:
    resources:
      static-locations: file:src/main/resources/static/
      cache:
        period: 0

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Enabled Spring DevTools live reload feature.
